subcodes.first_line: All things today are engaged in glorification and praise, for the Hidden Mystery hath mounted the Throne of Manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع اشیا الیوم بتسبیح و تهلیل مشغولند چه که غیب مکنون بر عرش ظهور مستوی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @the power of words; of speech
